# Robots.txt for BreederHQ Marketing Website
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap (auto-generated by @astrojs/sitemap at build time)
Sitemap: https://breederhq.com/sitemap-index.xml

# Common crawlers
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

# AI search bots: explicit allow (all major AI search engines that cite sources).
# Being explicit rather than relying on the User-agent: * default is a small but
# real citation-optimization signal. See public/llms.txt and public/okf/ for the
# machine-readable context these bots will find.

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# AI training-only crawler: keep blocked. Common Crawl trains models without
# citing sources back, so allowing it is worst-of-both-worlds. Blocking CCBot
# does NOT prevent citation from ChatGPT / Claude / Perplexity / Copilot, they
# use their own crawlers listed above.
User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

# Note: Crawl-delay removed. Google/Bing ignore it and it can throttle
# lesser crawlers unnecessarily. Use Google Search Console to control crawl rate.
